description: Duran Li discusses tools and techniques developed at Messari to build data-driven applications on Solana, addressing challenges like data fragmentation and ingestion. He shares insights on creating a community-focused Solana portal and the evolution of their data processing from ETL to ELT, emphasizing the importance of data observability and governance in AI applications.
topic_summary: In this talk, Duran Li presents strategies for building insightful applications on Solana, focusing on data challenges and solutions, including the development of a community portal and the transition to improved data processing methodologies [t=10:48].
